OPERATIONAL_NARRATIVE:
Rooster Petroleum, LLC (02871) has successfully completed P&A operations of the ST 99 Well #1. The "D" Sd perfs (3,338'-3,436' MD) were sqz'd w/ 1.7 bbl (9 sxs, 9.7 cu ft) Class H Cmt; TOC at 3,138' MD & pressure tested to 1000 psi. The "C" Sd perfs (3,060'-3,074' MD) were sqz'd w/ 4.8 bbls (25 sxs, 27 cu ft) Class H cmt; TOC at 2,860' MD & pressure tested to 1000 psi. A CIBP was set in the 2-3/8" LS & SS tbg at 2,490' MD. Bridge plugs were independently tested to 1000 psi. The 2-3/8" LS & SS tbg was perf'd at 2,465' MD. A balanced cmt plug was set in the 2-3/8" LS & SS tbg and 2-3/8" x 7-5/8" annulus w/ 12.8 bbls (66.5 sxs, 72 cu ft); w/ SS TOC at 2,150' MD & LS TOC at 2,177' MD independently pressure tested to 1000 psi. The 2-3/8" LS & SS prod tbg was cut/pulled f/ 1,063' MD (904' BML). A CIBP was set in the 7-5/8" csg at 959' (800' BML). A 310' balanced cmt plug was set in the 7-5/8" annulus w/ 13.8 bblsw (71.6 sxs, 77.3 cu ft) f/ 649'-959' MD (490'-800' BML) and pressure tested to 1000 psi. The 7-5/8" csg was cut/pulled f/ 559' MD. A CIBP was set in the 10-3/4" csg at 459' MD (300' BML). A 200 surf cmt plug was set w/ 19.6 bbls (102 sxs, 110.2 cu ft) Class H Cmt f/ 259'-459' MD & weight tested. 
The remaining csg strings were cut/pulled f/ the following depths:
1.  10-3/4" Csg - 30' BML
2.  16" Csg - 30' BML
3.  24" DP - 24' BML
Operations commenced 09/09/2014 and were completed 09/18/2014.

The Mad Dog batch set drilling operations installed 36" conductor and 22" surface casing in Green Canyon Block 782. The batch set wells include MD12, MD15, MD16, MD17 and MD18, respectively.  Batch set operations started on September 25, 2013 and concluded on December 21, 2013 with all of the batch set wells status drilling suspended.  The Mad Dog Spar Rig was used for the batch set operation, no BOPs were used during any part of the batch set since all operations were open water.
